original_text:
### Contrast
- **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]
- Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy. **Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.
- **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

relations.note: The approved and prohibited pair guidance operationalizes the general contrast-testing requirement.
Both accessibility requirements apply when color is used in text or interface communication.

quotes: **Test contrast levels** (webaim.com or equivalent) for every text/background pair. [GENERAL minimums: WCAG AA — 4.5:1 body text, 3:1 large text ≥24px or 19px bold.]

rules.intent: Ensure text remains legible and meets the stated accessibility minimums.
rules.rule_text: Test every text/background pair with webaim.com or an equivalent tool. Meet WCAG AA minimum contrast of 4.5:1 for body text and 3:1 for large text (at least 24px, or 19px bold).

quotes: Known-safe pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, Graphite on White/Light Blue/Golden Sand; White on Brand Blue/Deep Blue/Dark Navy.
**Avoid:** Gold or Sunshine text on White (fails contrast) — golds are for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

rules.intent: Maintain approved contrast-safe color application and prevent inaccessible gold text on white.
rules.rule_text: Use the known-safe text/background pairs: Brand Blue, Deep Blue, Dark Navy, or Graphite text on White, Light Blue, or Golden Sand; and White text on Brand Blue, Deep Blue, or Dark Navy. Do not use Gold or Sunshine text on White because it fails contrast. Reserve golds for surfaces, rules, and large display emphasis only.

quotes: **Don't rely on color alone** to convey meaning — pair with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.

rules.intent: Ensure meaning is available to people who cannot distinguish the color treatment.
rules.rule_text: Do not rely on color alone to convey meaning; pair color with icons, depth, clear copy, or visual feedback.
